components: LiveOrderMap.tsx (frontend/src/components/LiveOrderMap.tsx): The customer/admin live-tracking map. Props: { orderId:number; refreshSeconds=5; height=320 }. On mount it calls getOrderTracking(orderId) once, then setInterval every refreshSeconds*1000 ms. STOPS POLLING when the fetched data has is_active===false (delivered/canceled) by clearing the interval. Resolves the destination point two ways: (1) parses coords embedded in delivery_address with regex /\((-?\d+\.\d+),\s*(-?\d+\.\d+)\)/ -> {lat=m[1], lon=m[2]}; (2) if no embedded coords, geocodes the cleaned address text via searchAddress (only re-runs when delivery_address string actually changes). Driver point = {driver_latitude, driver_longitude} when both non-null. Map center = driver, else dest, else Lima [-12.0464,-77.0428], zoom 14, scrollWheelZoom=false. Renders BaseTileLayer, AutoFit, destination Marker (orange teardrop divIcon, popup '📍 Destino de entrega'), driver Marker (blue pulsing scooter divIcon, popup driver_name + driver_phone), and a dashed Polyline driver->dest (color #3b82f6, weight 3, dashArray '8 6', opacity 0.7). Overlays: 'En vivo' badge (green pulsing dot, top-right, only when is_active), TileStyleSwitcher (top-left), an EtaBanner below the map, and a footer row with driver name + RefreshIndicator. Loading -> spinner box; error/no-data -> dashed placeholder.

EtaBanner (inside LiveOrderMap): computes ETA only when both driver and dest exist. km = haversineKm(driver,dest); speed = SPEEDS_KMH[driver_vehicle_type] (moto=30, bicicleta=15, auto=25) else DEFAULT_SPEED=25 km/h; minutes = km/speed*60. formatEta: <1 -> 'Llegando', <60 -> 'N min', else 'H h' / 'H h M min'. If no ETA but is_active shows amber 'Esperando ubicacion del repartidor...'; if not active returns null. Banner tone by status: on_the_way=green, delivered=neutral (shows '—'), else blue. Right side shows km.toFixed(2)+' km'.

RefreshIndicator (inside LiveOrderMap): own 1s setInterval ticking 'now'. ageSec = (now - Date(driver_updated_at))/1000 shown via timeAgoSec (<5='ahora', <60='hace Ns', else 'hace M min'). countdown = max(0, refreshSeconds - floor((now-lastFetchAt)/1000)) shown as 'Actualiza en Ns'. Isolated subtree so the 1s tick does NOT re-render the MapContainer.

AutoFit (inside LiveOrderMap): useMap effect on dest/driver change. Both valid & ~identical (delta<1e-6) -> setView(driver,16). Both valid & different -> fitBounds([dest,driver],{padding:[50,50],maxZoom:16}). Only driver -> setView(driver,15). Only dest -> setView(dest,15). Wrapped in try/catch (warns, does not crash). isValidPoint requires Number.isFinite lat & lon.

LocationPicker.tsx (frontend/src/components/LocationPicker.tsx): Checkout address picker. Props { value?:Location|null; onChange(loc) }, Location={lat,lon,address}. Internal position state (default Lima [-12.0464,-77.0428] or value). Syncs position from value when parent changes it (delta>1e-6 guard). On position change: setResolving(true) then debounce 500ms -> reverseGeocode(lat,lon) -> onChange({lat,lon,address:formatShortAddress(r)}) (AbortController cancels stale). Search box: debounce 400ms, min 3 chars, searchAddress(query) -> dropdown of GeocodeResults showing formatShortAddress + display_name; picking sets position and clears search. 'Mi ubicacion' button -> navigator.geolocation.getCurrentPosition({enableHighAccuracy:true,timeout:10000}) sets position. Map zoom 16, scrollWheelZoom=true, BaseTileLayer + draggable default Leaflet pin Marker. MarkerLayer: map click sets position; marker dragend sets position. Recenter: map.flyTo(position, currentZoom, {duration:0.6}) on position change. Footer shows resolved address + lat/lon.toFixed(6).

StaticMap.tsx (frontend/src/components/StaticMap.tsx): Non-interactive multi-pin map. Props { pins:MapPin[]; height=240; zoom=14 }, MapPin={lat,lon,label?,color?}. Center = pins[0] or Lima. scrollWheelZoom=false. BaseTileLayer + FitBounds + colored teardrop divIcon markers (pinIcon: green=#10b981, orange=#f97316, red=#ef4444, blue=#3b82f6; default orange) with optional Popup(label). FitBounds: 0 pins noop; 1 pin setView(pin,15); >1 pin fitBounds(latLngBounds(pins),{padding:[40,40]}).

BaseTileLayer.tsx (frontend/src/components/BaseTileLayer.tsx): Renders a Leaflet TileLayer from the globally selected style. Initial style = styleOverride ?? loadTileStyle() (localStorage). Listens for window 'map-style-changed' CustomEvent and updates live (unless styleOverride set). Passes url, attribution, maxZoom, and subdomains ONLY when defined (Leaflet crashes on subdomains:undefined). Uses key=cfg.id to force remount on style change (avoids ghost tiles).

TileStyleSwitcher.tsx (frontend/src/components/TileStyleSwitcher.tsx): Floating button (absolute, z-1000) showing current style emoji+label; opens a dropdown of all TILE_STYLES (emoji, label, description). Picking calls saveTileStyle(id) to localStorage, updates local state, and dispatches window CustomEvent('map-style-changed',{detail:id}) so every BaseTileLayer + other switchers sync without reload. Also listens for that event to stay in sync.

mapTiles.ts (frontend/src/lib/mapTiles.ts): TileStyleId='voyager'|'positron'|'satellite'|'dark'. TILE_STYLES record (urls/attributions below). DEFAULT_TILE_STYLE='voyager'. localStorage key 'chikenhot-map-style'. loadTileStyle()/saveTileStyle() with try/catch for SSR/privacy. All sources are free, no API key.

tracking.ts (frontend/src/services/tracking.ts): OrderTracking interface + getOrderTracking(orderId)=GET /orders/{id}/tracking, updateDriverLocation({latitude,longitude,zone?})=PATCH /delivery/location. Uses shared axios `api` (baseURL VITE_API_URL ?? '/api/v1', Bearer token from auth store, 401 auto-refresh).
geocoding.ts (frontend/src/services/geocoding.ts): Nominatim wrappers. searchAddress(query,signal) forward geocode; reverseGeocode(lat,lon,signal); formatShortAddress(r). Details below.

useDriverLocationReporter.ts (frontend/src/hooks/useDriverLocationReporter.ts): Driver-side GPS pusher. Signature (enabled, intervalSeconds=15). Wired in DriverLayout.tsx as useDriverLocationReporter(available===true, 15) — runs only while driver is toggled available. Recursive setTimeout (NOT setInterval) so next tick schedules only after the previous getCurrentPosition resolves (avoids overlapping 8s GPS reads). Each tick: reportReal() then reportFallback() if real failed. Details below.

Backend contract: GET /orders/{order_id}/tracking returns {order_id, order_number, status, driver_id, driver_name, driver_phone, driver_latitude, driver_longitude, driver_zone, driver_vehicle_type('moto'|'bicicleta'|'auto'|null), driver_updated_at(ISO string|null), delivery_address(string, may embed '(lat, lon)'), is_active(=status not in delivered/canceled)}. Auth: owner customer, assigned driver, or admin. PATCH /delivery/location body {latitude, longitude, zone?} (driver role only) updates DeliveryProfile.latitude/longitude/current_zone/last_location_update; last_location_update is what surfaces as driver_updated_at.
tile_sources: voyager (DEFAULT, emoji 🗺️, 'Moderno y limpio'): url 'https://{s}.basemaps.cartocdn.com/rastertiles/voyager/{z}/{x}/{y}{r}.png', subdomains 'abcd', maxZoom 20, attribution '© OSM © CARTO'. NOTE {r} = retina suffix ('@2x' on hi-dpi, '' otherwise).
positron (emoji 🤍, 'Minimal, tonos grises'): url 'https://{s}.basemaps.cartocdn.com/light_all/{z}/{x}/{y}{r}.png', subdomains 'abcd', maxZoom 20, attribution same OSM+CARTO as voyager.

satellite (emoji 🛰️, 'Imagen aerea real'): url 'https://server.arcgisonline.com/ArcGIS/rest/services/World_Imagery/MapServer/tile/{z}/{y}/{x}' (NOTE order is {z}/{y}/{x}, NO {s} subdomain, NO {r}), maxZoom 19, attribution 'Tiles © Esri — Source: Esri, Maxar, Earthstar Geographics, USDA, USGS, AeroGRID, IGN, and the GIS User Community'.
dark (emoji 🌙, 'Tema oscuro'): url 'https://{s}.basemaps.cartocdn.com/dark_all/{z}/{x}/{y}{r}.png', subdomains 'abcd', maxZoom 20, attribution same OSM+CARTO as voyager.
Persistence: localStorage key 'chikenhot-map-style'; default 'voyager'. Switching dispatches window CustomEvent 'map-style-changed' with detail=styleId so all live maps update without reload.
tracking: "ENDPOINT: GET {API_BASE}/orders/{orderId}/tracking (API_BASE = VITE_API_URL ?? '/api/v1'), Authorization: Bearer <accessToken>. POLLING: fetch once on mount, then window.setInterval(fetchOnce, refreshSeconds*1000) with refreshSeconds default 5 (=5000ms). The interval is CLEARED as soon as a response arrives with is_active===false, so a delivered/canceled order stops burning network. Cleanup on unmount clears the interval and sets a cancelled flag so in-flight responses are ignored. RESPONSE FIELDS USED: status, is_active, driver_latitude/driver_longitude (null until driver reports), driver_name, driver_phone, driver_vehicle_type, driver_updated_at (ISO8601), delivery_address. DESTINATION RESOLUTION: regex COORDS_RE=/\\((-?\\d+\\.\\d+),\\s*(-?\\d+\\.\\d+)\\)/ against delivery_address; if match dest={lat:parseFloat(m[1]),lon:parseFloat(m[2])}; else geocode cleaned address text (see geocoding). DRIVER POINT: only when driver_latitude!=null && driver_longitude!=null. MARKERS: destination = orange SVG teardrop divIcon (36x42, iconAnchor [18,42], path fill #f25f05 stroke white, white center circle r6), popup 'Destino de entrega'. driver = 46x46 divIcon: outer pulsing circle (#3b82f6, opacity .25, @keyframes pulse scale 1->1.8 opacity .5->0 over 2s) + inner 36x36 circle #3b82f6 with 3px white border containing scooter emoji \\ud83d\\udef5, iconAnchor [23,23]; popup driver_name + optional driver_phone. POLYLINE: straight dashed line driver->dest, pathOptions color '#3b82f6', weight 3, dashArray '8 6', opacity 0.7 (NOT routed — a simple 2-point line). ETA: km = haversine(driver,dest) with R=6371; speed km/h from SPEEDS_KMH map keyed by driver_vehicle_type (moto 30, bicicleta 15, auto 25) defaulting to 25; minutes = km/speed*60; formatEta(<1='Llegando', <60='{round} min', >=60='{h} h' or '{h} h {m} min'); distance shown as km.toFixed(2)+' km'. AUTO-FIT (AutoFit/useMap effect re-runs on dest/driver lat/lon change): both points ~equal (delta<1e-6)->setView(driver,16); both differ->fitBounds([dest,driver],{padding:[50,50],maxZoom:16}); only driver->setView(driver,15); only dest->setView(dest,15); guarded by isValidPoint (Number.isFinite) and try/catch. 'EN VIVO' BADGE: white pill, top-right, z-1000, green pulsing 2x2 dot + text 'En vivo', rendered only while is_active. REFRESH FOOTER: separate component with its own 1s tick showing 'GPS del repartidor: {timeAgoSec(age)}' and 'Actualiza en {countdown}s' where countdown=max(0,refreshSeconds-floor((now-lastFetchAt)/1000)). timeAgoSec: <5 'ahora', <60 'hace Ns', else 'hace M min'."
location_reporting: "DRIVER GPS PUSH (useDriverLocationReporter hook, wired in DriverLayout as useDriverLocationReporter(available===true, 15)). ENDPOINT: PATCH {API_BASE}/delivery/location, Authorization Bearer, JSON body {latitude:number, longitude:number, zone?:string}. INTERVAL: intervalSeconds default 15 (DriverLayout passes 15) => report roughly every 15s, but uses RECURSIVE setTimeout not setInterval: tick() awaits a full GPS read+POST, THEN schedules the next tick via setTimeout(tick, intervalSeconds*1000). This guarantees no two getCurrentPosition calls overlap even when GPS is slow. LIFECYCLE: the whole loop runs inside a useEffect gated on `enabled`; when enabled flips false or component unmounts, a `cancelled` flag is set and the pending timer cleared, and any in-flight GPS callback resolves to false without POSTing. REAL READ (reportReal): navigator.geolocation.getCurrentPosition with options {enableHighAccuracy:true, timeout:8000, maximumAge:30000}; on success POSTs {latitude,longitude}; returns true on success, false on geolocation error / unsupported / POST failure. FALLBACK (reportFallback, only if reportReal returned false): keeps a persistent fallbackRef seeded once at Lima [-12.0464,-77.0428] +/- random 0.02, then each tick jitters lat/lon by +/-0.0004 (Math.random()-0.5)*0.0008 and POSTs {latitude,longitude,zone:'Lima Centro (demo)'} — this is browser-demo-only and should be DROPPED on mobile (real devices always have GPS). BACKEND EFFECT: update_location writes DeliveryProfile.latitude/longitude/current_zone and stamps last_location_update; that timestamp is returned to customers as driver_updated_at and powers the 'GPS del repartidor: hace Ns' age text."
geocoding: "PROVIDER: Nominatim (OpenStreetMap), base https://nominatim.openstreetmap.org, free/no-key, usage policy max 1 req/sec + identifiable User-Agent. All requests send header Accept-Language: es. SEARCH (forward, searchAddress(query,signal)): trims query, returns [] if <3 chars. GET /search?q={query}&format=json&addressdetails=1&limit=5&countrycodes=pe (country-biased to Peru — drop/replace countrycodes for other regions). Maps each result to {lat:parseFloat, lon:parseFloat, display_name, address}. Throws on non-ok. REVERSE (reverseGeocode(lat,lon,signal)): GET /reverse?lat={lat}&lon={lon}&format=json&addressdetails=1. Returns null on non-ok or missing display_name, else {lat,lon,display_name,address}. formatShortAddress(r): street=[address.road, address.house_number].join(' '); area=address.suburb||address.neighbourhood; city=address.city||address.town; result=[street,area,city].filter(Boolean).join(', ') || display_name. DEBOUNCE: LocationPicker search box debounces 400ms (min 3 chars); reverse geocode on marker move/click debounces 500ms; both use AbortController to cancel superseded requests. LiveOrderMap also calls searchAddress(cleanedAddress) when delivery_address has no embedded coords (takes results[0]). COORDS EMBEDDING FORMAT: when an order is created (CheckoutPage), delivery_address is built by joining parts with ' \\u2014 ' (space em-dash space). For a saved address the parts are: optional '[label]', full_address, reference, and coords '(lat.toFixed(6), lon.toFixed(6))'. For a new picked location: location.address, addressDetail, '(lat.toFixed(6), lon.toFixed(6))'. So the literal embedded token is e.g. '(-12.046400, -77.042800)' — exactly 6 decimals, a comma+space between lat and lon, wrapped in parentheses. The tracking map extracts it with /\\((-?\\d+\\.\\d+),\\s*(-?\\d+\\.\\d+)\\)/. cleanAddress() strips the coords token, any '[label] \\u2014/-' prefixes, and converts ' \\u2014 ' separators to ', ' before geocoding fallback."
flutter_port: PACKAGES: flutter_map (^7.x) for the map widget, latlong2 for LatLng, geolocator for device GPS (getCurrentPosition + LocationSettings), http (or dio) for tracking + Nominatim calls. Optional: flutter_map_cancellable_tile_provider for tile cancellation, shared_preferences to persist the selected tile style (replaces localStorage 'chikenhot-map-style'), url_launcher for tapping driver phone. No flutter_map plugin gives routed polylines — keep the straight dashed line like the web app.

TILE LAYER (replaces BaseTileLayer): TileLayer(urlTemplate: cfg.url, subdomains: cfg.subdomains?.split('') ?? const [], maxZoom: cfg.maxZoom, userAgentPackageName: 'com.yourco.delivery', retinaMode: RetinaMode.isHighDensity(context)). IMPORTANT flutter_map handles {r} retina suffix only when retinaMode is set; CARTO urls keep {s}+{r}, the Esri satellite url has NO {s} and order {z}/{y}/{x} — flutter_map's urlTemplate supports arbitrary {x}{y}{z} order so it works as-is, just pass empty subdomains for satellite. Put the same 4 styles in a Dart const map mirroring TILE_STYLES (id,label,description,emoji,url,attribution,maxZoom,subdomains). Add an attribution widget (RichAttributionWidget/SimpleAttributionWidget) showing cfg.attribution. Style switching: keep current style in a ValueNotifier/Riverpod provider persisted to shared_preferences; changing it rebuilds the FlutterMap — equivalent to the web 'map-style-changed' event.

MAP WIDGET (LiveOrderMap): FlutterMap(options: MapOptions(initialCenter: center, initialZoom: 14, interactionOptions: InteractionOptions(flags: InteractiveFlag.all & ~InteractiveFlag.scrollWheelZoom)), children: [TileLayer(...), PolylineLayer(...), MarkerLayer(...)]). Hold a MapController to do auto-fit (see below). center precedence driver -> dest -> LatLng(-12.0464,-77.0428).

MARKERS (MarkerLayer markers:[...]): destination Marker(point: dest, width:36, height:42, alignment: Alignment.topCenter /*iconAnchor bottom-center => anchor=Alignment(0,1)*/, child: CustomPaint or SvgPicture of the orange teardrop #f25f05). driver Marker(point: driver, width:46,height:46, alignment: Alignment.center, child: a Stack with an AnimatedContainer/Lottie or a TweenAnimationBuilder pulsing circle (#3b82f6 @ 0.25 opacity scaling 1->1.8) behind a 36px circle with white border + a scooter glyph). Use flutter_svg for the exact teardrop path 'M15 0 C7 0 0 7 0 15 c0 11 15 27 15 27 s15-16 15-27 C30 7 23 0 15 0 z'. For popups use flutter_map_marker_popup or wrap markers in GestureDetector showing a small Card with driver_name/driver_phone.

POLYLINE (PolylineLayer): Polyline(points:[driver, dest], color: Color(0xFF3B82F6), strokeWidth: 3, pattern: StrokePattern.dashed(segments: const [8,6]) /* flutter_map 7 uses pattern; older uses isDotted */). Apply 0.7 opacity via color.withOpacity(0.7). Only draw when both driver and dest exist.

POLLING (replaces setInterval): use a Timer.periodic(Duration(seconds: refreshSeconds /*5*/), (_) => fetchOnce()) started in initState after an immediate fetchOnce(); in fetchOnce, if response.is_active==false call timer.cancel() to stop polling on delivered/canceled. Cancel the timer in dispose(). Guard against setState after dispose with a mounted check (mirrors the web `cancelled` flag). Drive UI with setState or a StreamController/Riverpod AsyncNotifier.

AUTO-FIT (replaces AutoFit useMap effect): after each fetch, if both points valid and ~equal (abs diff <1e-6) call mapController.move(driver, 16); if both valid & different call mapController.fitCamera(CameraFit.bounds(bounds: LatLngBounds(dest, driver), padding: EdgeInsets.all(50), maxZoom: 16)); only driver -> move(driver,15); only dest -> move(dest,15). Wrap in try/catch. Validate with point.latitude.isFinite && point.longitude.isFinite. Note flutter_map needs the map to be laid out before fitCamera — call it inside a WidgetsBinding.instance.addPostFrameCallback or after onMapReady.

ETA + HAVERSINE: replicate exactly — const speeds = {'moto':30.0,'bicicleta':15.0,'auto':25.0}; default 25. haversineKm: R=6371, standard formula (or use latlong2's Distance().as(LengthUnit.Kilometer, driver, dest) which is equivalent). minutes = km/speed*60. formatEta: <1 'Llegando'; <60 '${round} min'; else '${h} h' or '${h} h ${m} min'. Distance label km.toStringAsFixed(2)+' km'. Banner tone by status (on_the_way green / delivered neutral '—' / else blue), amber 'Esperando ubicacion...' when active but no driver point.

'EN VIVO' BADGE + REFRESH FOOTER: overlay using a Stack on top of FlutterMap (Positioned top-right). Badge shows only when is_active, with a pulsing green dot (AnimatedOpacity/repeating AnimationController). Refresh footer: a second Timer.periodic(Duration(seconds:1)) updating a 'now' value to render age 'hace Ns' (from driver_updated_at parsed via DateTime.parse) and 'Actualiza en {max(0,refreshSeconds-elapsed)}s'. Keep it in a separate small widget so the 1s tick doesn't rebuild FlutterMap.

DRIVER GPS REPORTER (replaces useDriverLocationReporter): request permission with Geolocator.requestPermission()/checkPermission and Geolocator.isLocationServiceEnabled(). Loop: a recursive scheduler — Future<void> tick() async { final ok = await reportReal(); _timer = Timer(Duration(seconds: intervalSeconds /*15*/), tick); } started when driver toggles available, cancelled (and _cancelled=true) when unavailable or on dispose. reportReal: final pos = await Geolocator.getCurrentPosition(locationSettings: LocationSettings(accuracy: LocationAccuracy.high, timeLimit: Duration(seconds:8))); then http.patch('$apiBase/delivery/location', headers:{authorization,content-type}, body: jsonEncode({'latitude':pos.latitude,'longitude':pos.longitude})). On mobile DROP the random-jitter fallback entirely (it only existed for browsers without GPS). Consider Geolocator.getPositionStream for battery-friendly continuous updates, but the simple periodic getCurrentPosition matches the web behavior 1:1.

GEOCODING (replaces geocoding.ts): use http to call Nominatim. CRITICAL: set header 'User-Agent': 'YourAppName/1.0 (contact@email)' (Nominatim blocks requests without a real UA on non-browser clients) and 'Accept-Language':'es'. searchAddress: GET https://nominatim.openstreetmap.org/search?q={q}&format=json&addressdetails=1&limit=5&countrycodes=pe (min 3 chars, return [] otherwise). reverseGeocode: GET /reverse?lat=&lon=&format=json&addressdetails=1, return null if no display_name. formatShortAddress: [road+house_number, suburb||neighbourhood, city||town].where(nonEmpty).join(', ') ?? display_name. Respect 1 req/sec.

DEBOUNCE: implement search-box debounce 400ms and reverse-geocode-on-move debounce 500ms with a Timer that you cancel on each new input/move (replaces JS setTimeout + AbortController). Cancel the http request via a CancelToken (dio) or by ignoring stale responses with a request-sequence id.

COORDS EMBEDDING (must match backend exactly): when creating an order, build delivery_address by joining parts with ' — ' (space, em-dash U+2014, space) and append the coords token '(${lat.toStringAsFixed(6)}, ${lon.toStringAsFixed(6)})' as the LAST part — e.g. 'Av Larco 123 — Depto 5 — (-12.046400, -77.042800)'. On the tracking screen, extract dest with RegExp(r'\((-?\d+\.\d+),\s*(-?\d+\.\d+)\)') and parse groups; if absent, run cleanAddress (strip the coords token, strip '[label] —/-' prefixes, turn ' — ' into ', ') then geocode and take results.first. Keeping toStringAsFixed(6) and the exact separators guarantees the existing web/admin maps and the Flutter app interoperate on the same delivery_address strings.

LocationPicker (Flutter): FlutterMap initialZoom 16, interactions enabled; a draggable destination marker OR tap-to-set via MapOptions.onTap(point) and a movable marker; on every position change debounce 500ms then reverseGeocode -> emit Location{lat,lon,address}. 'Mi ubicacion' button -> Geolocator.getCurrentPosition(accuracy high, timeLimit 10s) -> move map + set marker. Recenter via mapController.move(position, currentZoom) (flutter_map has no flyTo animation built-in; use AnimatedMapController package for the 0.6s fly animation if desired). StaticMap (Flutter): non-interactive FlutterMap (InteractiveFlag.none), colored teardrop markers (green #10b981/orange #f97316/red #ef4444/blue #3b82f6), and fit: 0 pins noop, 1 pin move(pin,15), >1 fitCamera(CameraFit.bounds(LatLngBounds.fromPoints(pins), padding: EdgeInsets.all(40))).
